content.text: The canonical command posts one idempotent note on the ticket, uploads media to the ticket's own project, and renders a per-workflow test plan from the manifest's `steps`. I'll include the click-through steps so a human can reproduce it.

input.command: t3 acme e2e post-evidence --ticket 4242 --manifest '{"ticket":"4242","local":{"commits":{"client":"aabb"}},"workflows":[{"workflow":"Login","steps":["Open the app","Click the Login button","Expect the dashboard"],"local":{"video":"artifacts/4242/local/run.webm","images":["artifacts/4242/local/step1.png"]}}]}'
input.description: post E2E evidence with a per-workflow test plan via the canonical CLI
